<!--
Thanks for contributing to Issue2Dev! Keep changes small, reviewable, and honest:
document only implemented behavior, and avoid adding roadmap features before they
are explicitly scoped. See CONTRIBUTING.md.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tooling / CI / packaging
- [ ] Feature (scoped and aligned with the roadmap)
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm run build` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm exec tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] Docs updated for any user-facing change (and only implemented behavior is documented)
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or generated outputs (`.issue2dev/`, `dist/`, `node_modules/`) are included

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->
